title: AX-17 improves low-temperature lithium-cell retention
abstract: AX-17 improved capacity retention by 22% after 500 cycles in coin cells tested at 25C with electrolyte E1.
finding: AX-17 improved capacity retention by 22% after 500 cycles.

title: Temperature-dependent limits of AX-17 electrolyte additives
abstract: AX-17 improved retention below 40C but increased degradation at 60C across repeated cycling tests.
finding: AX-17 benefits disappear at high temperature and degradation increases at 60C.

title: Replication of AX-17 depends on electrolyte background
abstract: An independent lab replicated AX-17's retention benefit with electrolyte E1 but found no measurable benefit with electrolyte E2.
finding: AX-17 replicated only with electrolyte E1 and failed to improve retention with E2.

title: Pouch-cell validation finds no high-temperature AX-17 benefit
abstract: Pouch-cell tests found no measurable AX-17 benefit under high-temperature operating conditions.
finding: AX-17 had no measurable benefit in high-temperature pouch-cell tests.
